videos.title: ISpeed tentou se vingar e fez isso na frente de Cristiano Ronaldo… a reação foi inacreditável 😳🔥
videos.description:
iShowSpeed aparece usando uma fantasia chamativa e surpreende todos com uma atitude ousada. Cristiano Ronaldo observa tudo e reage com risadas, enquanto a situação rapidamente sai do controle quando Randy Orton responde de forma intensa.

No ano seguinte, iShowSpeed retorna determinado a se vingar. Ele entra com tudo no ringue, elimina dois adversários em um único movimento e ainda faz seu gesto característico olhando diretamente para Ronaldo.

A reação de Ronaldo diante de tudo isso chama atenção e deixa o momento ainda mais marcante.

#CR7
#LionelMessi
#NeymarJr
#RonaldoJunior
#futebol

videos.title: Hard Times Come Again No More
videos.description:
In March, 2004 Mavis Staples came to Nashville to record Hard Times Come Again No More for our first release, Beautiful Dreamer: The Songs of Stephen Foster. The day was magical. We spent the afternoon as guests of historic Sound Emporium studio who graciously donated one of their rooms for the recording session. Buddy Miller, Steve Fishell and Matt Rollings backed Mavis up while our favorite sound engineer Dave Sinko recorded the incredible performance. Mavis nailed the track on the first run-through, but we persuaded her to sing the song a few times for our own pleasure and to the delight of our special in-studio guests Emmylou Harris and Julie Miller.
Buy it https://www.tamarasaviano.com/store/b...

videos.title: Hard Times Come Again No More
videos.description: Hard Times Come Again No More was published in 1854. It was composed by Stephen Foster perhaps only a year or two prior to its publication. The song predates the American Civil war by several years, but it became more widely known during the war. Over time it became an emotional anthem for Americans—especially those who study the Civil War and the post war reconstruction era. This song has been a favorite for Mark for many years. When the time came to arrange and record it, he felt that James Mangan had the perfect voice for such a beautiful melody. The video was filmed in the Wasatch mountain range in North Central Utah.

Made of Ale official release coming to all major DSPs 14th October 2022!! UK & US tours on sale now! https://found.ee/MadeofAleSessions

Welcome to the final of our live recording session called the “Made of Ale” sessions (pun intended). We recorded at “The Forge” in Bristol.


Our team for these recordings was Paul Worthington (producer, engineer), Sam Darley and Lucy Humphris (Camera operators) and Abbie Darley (Director, Camera Operator, Editor)
Also performing in many of these recordings are Rich Laws (Drums), Antonio Chiacchia (Double Bass) and Alex Garden (Fiddle)

videos.title: Bones in the Ocean Live | Made of Ale Sessions | The Longest Johns
videos.description:
Welcome to the fourth of our live recording sessions called the “Made of Ale” sessions (pun intended). We recorded at “The Forge” in Bristol.
Bones in the Ocean is one of our oldest original songs and still very near and dear to our hearts.


Our team for these recordings was Paul Worthington (producer, engineer), Sam Darley and Lucy Humphris (Camera operators) and Abbie Darley (Director, Camera Operator, Editor)

videos.transcript: Pesquisar transcrição oh i bid farewell to the port and the land and i paddled away from brave england's white sands to search for my long-ago forgotten friends to search for the place i hear all sailors end as the souls of the dead fill the space of my mind i'll search without sleeping till peace i can find i fear not the weather i fear not the sea i remember the fallen do they think of me when their bones in the ocean forever will be plot a course to the night to a place i once knew to a place where my hope died along with my crew so i swallow my grief and face life's final test to find promise of peace and the solace of rest as the souls of the dead fill the space of my ears they'll laughter like children they're beckoning cheers my heart longs to join them sing songs of the sea i remember the fallen do they think of me when their bones in the ocean forever will be when at last before my ghostly shipmates i stand i shed a small tear for my home upon land though there i speak of deaths filled with struggle and strife their smiles below say i don't owe them my life as the souls of the dead fill the space of my eyes and my boat listed over and tried to capsize i'm this far from drowning this far from the sea i remember the living do they think of me when my bones in the ocean forever will be now that i'm staring down at the darkest abyss i'm not sure what i want but i don't think it's this as my comrades call to stand fast and for john i make sale for the dawn till the darkness has gone [Music] as the souls of the dead live for air in my mind as i live all the years that they left me behind i'll stay on the shore but still gaze at the sea i remember the fallen and they think of me for our souls in the ocean together will be i remember the fallen and they think of me for our souls in the ocean together will be [Music] as the souls of the dead fill the space of my eyes and my boat listed over and tried to capsize i'm this far from drowning this far from the sea i remember the living do they think of me when my bones in the ocean forever will be

videos.transcript: Pesquisar transcrição in the belfast yard where she was made of harlem wolf design the plan was struck to build three ships that funds would not define the gantry raised up in a weight a nameless liner rose to make the journeys to new york in record time and so she's the pride of the white star line may her engines never stall her sisters died from berg and mine but she'll run for decades more she'll run for decades more olympics soon became a stamp no finer shifted sail smoking rooms and turkish baths and palm trees rail to rail as sleek and striking as could be and speed second to none she sailed from portsmouth dock and show the world how it was done she's the pride of the white star line may her engines never stall her sisters die from berg and mine but she'll run for decades more she'll run for decades more the hawk was running along her side around the isle of wight a swing to starboard up and took the helmsman by surprise two holes were punched into her side and water flooded in she staggered back to portsmouth dock and lived to sail again she's the pride of the white star line may her engines never stall her sisters die from berg [Music] titanic sank into the depths britannic joined her too through the wars olympic kept on sailing sure and true missions out in open sea with u-boats in her stead damn near cut him clean in two and sank him to the bed she's the pride of the white star [Music] now every dog must have its day and all good things must pass shipyards forged much bigger crafts that dwarfed her in a class the trips were few and fairs declined the world marched on ahead they pulled her down in jarrow town still striking till the end she's the pride of the white star line may her engines never stall she'll run for decades more she'll run for decades more [Music] she's the pride of the white star line may her engines never stall her sisters died from berg and mine but she'll run for decades more she'll run for decades more

videos.transcript: Pesquisar transcrição [Music] [Applause] [Music] I am a poor way fair and stranger traveling through this world of war there is no sickness toil or danger in that fell land to which I go I'm going home to see my mother I'm going in home no more WR I'm just going over Jordan I'm just going over [Music] home I know dark clouds were har on me I know my power is a rough and steep but golden Feld lie out before me well weary eyes no more shall we I'm going home to see my father I'm going home no more to R I'm just going over Jordan I'm just going over [Music] home us him be free from every trial this form shall rest beneath the sun I'll drop the cross of self denial and enter in that home with God I'm going home to meet my saor I'm going home no more to roll I'm just going over Jordan I'm just going over I'm going home to me my I'm going home no more to R I'm just going over Jordan I'm just going over home [Music] I'm just over Jordan I'm just going over home [Music] day
